queries.q: Here's a messy Slack thread about our onboarding numbers cratering; tell me what to do next and how to execute it

We're stuck and I don't know what matters most right now; give me the critical next effort from these notes
Take this draft PRD that never went anywhere and tell me the single most important thing to do with it
Pull together a plan from this chaotic incident write-up: what's binding us and what do we do first
I pasted three weeks of scattered standup notes; what's actually the priority here and how do I run it
Turn this raw customer interview transcript into a next-action plan with the critical effort called out
Everything feels urgent and nothing is sequenced; help me figure out what's actually next
Given this executive ask and the constraints I've listed, build me one plan with risks and a pre-mortem
I have a pile of context about a stalled migration; what's the one thing to do next and how do I sequence the rest
I already know what's on the list; just run RICE and ICE against these ten items and rank them

queries.q: Score these twelve features with weighted scoring using our four stated criteria
Here's a finished PRD, just tell me what's wrong with it
